title: OAuthFlow
description: Subscription-connect flow state. RUNTIME-DECLARED presentation (S1 gap ③): the server declares what to show and what it expects back; the UI renders declaratively and never keys off a vendor→form table. UI shell semantics mirror the existing BackendOAuthPanel (2s poll, 15-min timeout, cancel). Forms A/B/C from spec §5 frame 09 are presentation patterns the declaration composes: A = auth_url + expects paste_code; B = auth_url + device_code + expects none; C = auth_url + expects paste_callback_url. Under Option 1, native_cli subscription connect drives the CLI's own login through this same shape.

source_id.description: v1.1: pending Source this flow binds to (deterministic association; hub-channel flows always set it)

channel.description: where the resulting credential will live; hub-held subscriptions only behind the consent-gated experimental flag (S2)

instructions_key.description: i18n key for the step-2 helper line

error_key.description: i18n key; raw upstream errors never surface
